overall.description: First-person walking gameplay from GTA V through the Strawberry neighborhood of Los Santos. The player walks along sidewalks past the iconic Hayes Autos painted wall, crosses a busy intersection with a freight train passing, and continues along a palm-lined street with commercial buildings.

events.description: turns right from facing building to walking along sidewalk
Hayes Autos painted wall comes into view on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along urban sidewalk passing utility boxes and trash bins

entered.detail: multi-story modern office building with vertical window strips
standard traffic signal on metal pole with pedestrian button

black public waste bins on sidewalk edge
blue painted wooden fence running along property line
red brick wall with large white painted letters reading HAYES AUTOS

segments.scene_description: The segment begins facing a tall white office building, then turns right to walk along a sunny urban sidewalk. The camera passes utility boxes and trash bins before the iconic Hayes Autos painted wall comes into view on the right, marking the location as GTA V's Los Santos.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with auto shop and corrugated metal fencing

events.description: pedestrians appear walking toward camera on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing along sidewalk passing the Hayes Autos wall and approaching pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera on the sidewalk wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: weathered metal sheet fencing with graffiti tags
commercial advertisement billboard above the fence line

segments.scene_description: Walking along the Hayes Autos wall, the camera passes weathered corrugated metal fencing and approaches pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. The environment is a sunny commercial street with light vehicle traffic passing on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with railroad crossing and red paved crosswalks

events.description: exits sidewalk and enters the wide intersection crosswalk
freight train passes through the railroad crossing in the background
turns left after crossing to follow the new sidewalk direction

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while observing traffic, then turning left onto new sidewalk

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving through the intersection perpendicular to camera path

entered.detail: standard traffic signal array over the intersection
crossing gates and warning lights for the train tracks
distinctive red colored pedestrian crossing pavement
long freight train passing through the crossing in the distance
multi-story concrete parking garage with palm trees alongside

segments.scene_description: The camera leaves the sidewalk and enters a wide sunlit intersection with red paved crosswalks. A freight train passes through the railroad crossing ahead while vehicles drive through the intersection. After crossing, the camera turns left to walk alongside a brown parking structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with parking garage and palm tree landscaping

events.description: enters new sidewalk section with close-up view of parking garage and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along sidewalk next to multi-story parking structure with palm trees

entered.detail: ornate black metal street lamp posts along the sidewalk
hazy mountains visible on the horizon beyond the city

segments.scene_description: Walking along a new sidewalk section, the camera passes close to a brown concrete parking garage lined with palm trees. The street is quieter here with distant mountains visible under the bright morning sun, continuing the urban exploration through Los Santos.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a sunny urban neighborhood that transitions from a dense commercial strip to a quieter, palm-lined street. It begins facing a tall white office building before turning right to move along a sidewalk past utility boxes and trash bins toward the iconic Hayes Autos painted wall. As the camera continues past weathered corrugated fencing and oncoming pedestrians, the scene opens into a wide sunlit intersection where a freight train passes through a railroad crossing. The movement then shifts across red paved crosswalks and turns left, moving away from the traffic and alongside a brown concrete parking structure. Finally, the path leads past a row of palm trees under a bright morning sun, with the urban landscape opening up to reveal distant mountains.
